---
title: "master_analysis_cleanup"
author: "Savannah K. Miller"
date: "2026-06-20"
output: 
  pdf_document: 
    output_dir: "C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData\/GitHub/DepositionSFB/images"
---

```{r}
# Master Sediment Database Cleaning Workflow
# Package groups are organized by primary function:
# Data import → Spatial Data and Mapping →  Cleaning → Analysis → Visualization → Mapping → Reporting
```

```{r, load packages and working directory}

# data import and database management 
# reading files, reshaping data, and efficient data handling 

#######################################################

library(readxl) # import excel spreadsheets
library(data.table) #quick manipulation of large datasets
library(stringr) # text and string processing 
library(lubridate) # data and time handling 
library(writexl) # exports editted databases into excel files

#######################################################

# General data science workflow 
# Collection of packages for data manipulation and plotting

#######################################################

library(tidyverse)

#######################################################

#Statistical analyses and mixed models 
# Hypothesis testing, summaries, and model fitting 

#######################################################

library(gt) # displaying formatted tables for statistics 
library(rstatix) # statistical tests and assumption checking
library(lmerTest) # p-values and tests for lme4 models 
library(lme4) # linear and generalized mixed-effects models
library(ggeffects) # predicted values and marginal effects 

#######################################################

# Data visualization 
# Plot creation, figure assembly, and publication formatting 

#######################################################

library(patchwork) #comvine ggplots into multi-panel figures
library(cowplot) # figure arrangement and plot annotations
library(rcartocolor) # color palettes
library(ggh4x) # advanced ggplot extensions
library(scales) # axis labels, formatting, and scaling 

#######################################################
# Spatial data and mapping 
# GIS data handling and map visualization
#######################################################

library(sf) #spatial vector data
library(ggmap) #basemaps and geographic visualization
library(ggspatial) #spatial annotations and map elements
library(leaflet) #interactive web maps

#######################################################

#Tables and report outputs 
# Interactive tables and report presentation 

#######################################################

library(reactable) #interactive tables for reports

#######################################################
# R markdown and document rendering 
# PDF generation and LaTeX support 
#######################################################

library(tinytex) #LaTeX engine for PDF knitting


```

## R Markdown

```{r, working directory and consistent plot theme}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData/GitHub/DepositionSFB/data')
```

## Including Plots

```{r, load raw data and prep}

sed_thesis <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\thesis_sed.csv")

str(sed_thesis)


# Clean whitespace from character columns only
sed_thesis$Dist <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Dist, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Tran <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Tran, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Year     <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Year, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Site    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Site, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Replicate    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Replicate, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Flux   <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Flux, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Study.Phase   <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Study.Phase, " ", "")

# Change to factor (independent variables) and numeric (dependent variables)

sed_thesis$Dist = as.character(sed_thesis$Dist)
sed_thesis$Date.placed.in.field = as.Date(sed_thesis$Date.placed.in.field, 
  format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
  )
sed_thesis$Date.removed.from.field = as.Date(sed_thesis$Date.removed.from.field,            format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
sed_thesis$Study.Phase <- as.factor(sed_thesis$Study.Phase)
sed_thesis$Site <- as.factor(sed_thesis$Site)
sed_thesis$Tran <- as.factor(sed_thesis$Tran)
sed_thesis$Dist <- as.factor(sed_thesis$Dist)
sed_thesis$Replicate<- as.factor(sed_thesis$Replicate)
sed_thesis$Year<- as.factor(sed_thesis$Year)
sed_thesis$Flux <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Flux)
sed_thesis$Master_Flag <- as.factor(sed_thesis$Master_Flag)
sed_thesis$NegValue_Num <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$NegValue_Num)
sed_thesis$DryTime_Obsv <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$DryTime_Obsv)
sed_thesis$Position_Obsv <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Position_Obsv)
sed_thesis$OpenBag_Obsv <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$OpenBag_Obsv)
sed_thesis$Drop_Obsv <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Drop_Obsv) 
sed_thesis$Bio_Obsv <-as.numeric(sed_thesis$Bio_Obsv)
sed_thesis$Flood_Obsv <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Flood_Obsv)
sed_thesis$RB_Num <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$RB_Num)
sed_thesis$Filter_Num <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Filter_Num)

# Changing the from site abbreviations to Descriptive Site Names

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
  mutate(Site = case_when(
    Site %in% c("C") ~ "CorteMadera",
    Site %in% c("G") ~ "GiantMarsh", 
    Site %in% c("B") ~ "Buck'sLanding", 
    Site %in% c("S") ~ "SanPablo", 
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

# Making a Marsh Edge Type Categorization 

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
  mutate(marsh_edge_type = case_when(
    Site %in% c("CorteMadera", "GiantMarsh") ~ "Scarped", 
    Site %in% c("Buck'sLanding", "SanPablo") ~ "Ramped", 
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ), 
  marsh_edge_type = factor(marsh_edge_type, levels = c("Scarped", "Ramped"))
  )

#Making a Marsh Orientation Categorization

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
  mutate(marsh_orientation = case_when(
    Site %in% c("CorteMadera", "Buck'sLanding") ~ "East.facing", 
    Site %in% c("SanPablo") ~ "South.facing", 
    Site %in% c("GiantMarsh") ~ "West.facing", 
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ), 
    marsh_orientation = factor(marsh_orientation, levels = c("East.facing", "South.facing", "West.facing"))
)

# Adding a Phenological Period column

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
    mutate(Phen_Period= case_when(
      Study.Phase %in% c("M1", "M2", "M3") ~ "Late_Dry\n(Months 1-3)", 
      Study.Phase %in% c("M4", "M5", "M6") ~ "Tran\n(Months 4-6)", 
      Study.Phase %in% c("M7", "M8", "M9") ~ "Wet\n(Months 7-9)", 
      Study.Phase %in% c("M10") ~ "Growth\n(Months 10-12)"
    ), 
    Phen_Period = factor(Phen_Period, levels = c("Late_Dry\n(Months 1-3)", "Tran\n(Months 4-6)", "Wet\n(Months 7-9)", "Growth\n(Months 10-12)")
    ))
    

# Adding a Marsh Area category

sed_thesis <- sed_thesis %>% 
    mutate(Marsh_Area = case_when (
      Dist %in% c("0.5", "2", "6") ~ "Edge", 
      Dist %in% c("12", "18", "24") ~ "Platform", 
      Dist %in% c("48") ~ "Upland"
    ), 
    Marsh_Area = factor(Marsh_Area, levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland")) 
    )

#check before plotting or modeling 
str(sed_thesis) 
glimpse(sed_thesis)
summary(sed_thesis)
colSums(is.na(sed_thesis))

summary(sed_thesis$Date.placed.in.field)
summary(sed_thesis$Date.removed.from.field)

sed_thesis[is.na(sed_thesis$Date.placed.in.field), 
           "Date.placed.in.field"]

sed_thesis[is.na(sed_thesis$Date.removed.from.field), 
           "Date.removed.from.field"]

# Check replication to prevent design problems

#sed_thesis %>% count(Flux, Year) 
#sed_thesis %>% count(Year, Study.Phase)
#sed_thesis %>% count(Tran, Replicate)


readr::write_csv(sed_thesis, "C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis.csv")


```

```{r, double check factor variable levels for Master Data Sheet}


# Deposition alone 

master_thesis <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis.csv")

# Reassign factors to appropriate variables 

master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field, 
        format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field,            
        format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Study.Phase <- factor(master_thesis$Study.Phase, levels = c("M1", "M2", "M3", "M4", "M5", "M6","M7", "M8", "M9", "M10", "M11", "M12"))
master_thesis$Site <- as.factor(master_thesis$Site)
master_thesis$Tran <- as.factor(master_thesis$Tran)
master_thesis$Dist <- as.factor(master_thesis$Dist)
master_thesis$Replicate<- as.factor(master_thesis$Replicate)
master_thesis$Year<- as.factor(master_thesis$Year)
master_thesis$Flux <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Flux)
master_thesis$Phen_Period <- factor(master_thesis$Phen_Period, levels = c("Late_Dry\n(Months 1-3)", "Tran\n(Months 4-6)", "Wet\n(Months 7-9)", "Growth\n(Months 10-12)"))
master_thesis$marsh_edge_type <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_edge_type)
master_thesis$marsh_orientation <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_orientation)
master_thesis$Marsh_Area <- as.factor(master_thesis$Marsh_Area)
master_thesis$Master_Flag <- as.factor(master_thesis$Master_Flag)
master_thesis$NegValue_Num <- as.numeric(master_thesis$NegValue_Num)
master_thesis$DryTime_Obsv <- as.numeric(master_thesis$DryTime_Obsv)
master_thesis$Position_Obsv <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Position_Obsv)
master_thesis$OpenBag_Obsv <- as.numeric(master_thesis$OpenBag_Obsv)
master_thesis$Drop_Obsv <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Drop_Obsv) 
master_thesis$Bio_Obsv <-as.numeric(master_thesis$Bio_Obsv)
master_thesis$Flood_Obsv <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Flood_Obsv)
master_thesis$RB_Num <- as.numeric(master_thesis$RB_Num)
master_thesis$Filter_Num <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Filter_Num)


```

```{r, Distributions}


sed_basic= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Flux)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)), y = "Count") 
  
sed_basic

# Deposition by Edge Type 

sed_edge= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = marsh_edge_type, y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Edge Type", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_edge


# Deposition by Elevation (do this later once you've figured out z*) 

#sed_z= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = z*, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  #geom_boxplot() + 
  #geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
 # theme_minimal() +
  #labs(x = "z*", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

#sed_z

# Deposition by Distance from Marsh Edge 

sed_dist_edge= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Distance from the Marsh Edge (m) ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_dist_edge

# Deposition by Phenological Time

sed_time= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Phen_Period, y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Phenological Period ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_time


# Deposition by Marsh Area

sed_edge_area= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_edge_area


# Deposition by Phenological Time by Site

sed_site_time= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Phen_Period, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Phenological Period ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_site_time


# Deposition by Marsh Area by Site

sed_site_area= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_site_area


# Deposition by Study Phase by Site

sed_phase_site= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Phase ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_phase_site

# Deposition by Study Phase by Site (log)

sed_phase_site_log = ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Phase ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 
sed_phase_site_log

# Deposition by Study Phase by Marsh Edge Type

sed_phase_edge= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Edge Type ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 
sed_phase_edge


# Deposition by Study Phase Across Marsh Area

sed_phase_area= ggplot(master_thesis, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = Study.Phase)) +
  facet_wrap(~Site) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
  ) 
       
sed_phase_area
```

```{r, Seeing data without Giant Marsh }

plot_data_noG <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(!(Site == "GiantMarsh"))


sed_basic_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Flux)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)), y = "Count") 

sed_basic_noG

# Deposition by Edge Type 

sed_edge_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = marsh_edge_type, y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Edge Type", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_edge_noG


# Deposition by Elevation (do this later once you've figured out z*) 

#sed_z_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = z*, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
#geom_boxplot() + 
#geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
# theme_minimal() +
#labs(x = "z*", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

#sed_z_noG

# Deposition by Distance from Marsh Edge 

sed_dist_edge_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Distance from the Marsh Edge (m) ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_dist_edge_noG

# Deposition by Phenological Time

sed_time_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Phen_Period, y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Phenological Period ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_time_noG


# Deposition by Marsh Area

sed_edge_area_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_edge_area_noG


# Deposition by Phenological Time by Site

sed_site_time_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Phen_Period, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Phenological Period ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_site_time_noG


# Deposition by Marsh Area by Site

sed_site_area_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_site_area_noG


# Deposition by Study Phase by Site

sed_phase_site_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Phase ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_phase_site_noG

# Deposition by Study Phase by Site (log)

sed_phase_site_log_noG = ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Phase ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 
sed_phase_site_log_noG

# Deposition by Study Phase by Marsh Edge Type

sed_phase_edge_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Phase", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 
sed_phase_edge_noG


# Deposition by Study Phase Across Marsh Area

sed_phase_area_noG= ggplot(plot_data_noG, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = Study.Phase)) +
  facet_wrap(~Site) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
  ) 

sed_phase_area_noG


```

```{r, seeing data without Giant Marsh, Transect 2}

plot_data_noG2 <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(!(Site == "GiantMarsh" & Tran == "2"))


sed_basic_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Flux)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)), y = "Count") 

sed_basic_noG2

# Deposition by Edge Type 

sed_edge_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = marsh_edge_type, y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Edge Type", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_edge_noG2


# Deposition by Elevation (do this later once you've figured out z*) 

#sed_z_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = z*, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
#geom_boxplot() + 
#geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
# theme_minimal() +
#labs(x = "z*", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

#sed_z_noG2

# Deposition by Distance from Marsh Edge 

sed_dist_edge_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Distance from the Marsh Edge (m) ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_dist_edge_noG2

# Deposition by Phenological Time

sed_time_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Phen_Period, y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Phenological Period ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_time_noG2


# Deposition by Marsh Area

sed_edge_area_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_edge_area_noG2


# Deposition by Phenological Time by Site

sed_site_time_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Phen_Period, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Phenological Period ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_site_time_noG2


# Deposition by Marsh Area by Site

sed_site_area_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_site_area_noG2


# Deposition by Study Phase by Site

sed_phase_site_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Phase ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 

sed_phase_site_noG2

# Deposition by Study Phase by Site (log)

sed_phase_site_log_noG2 = ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Phase ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 
sed_phase_site_log_noG2

# Deposition by Study Phase by Marsh Edge Type

sed_phase_edge_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Study.Phase, y = Flux, color = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Edge Type ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))) 
sed_phase_edge_noG2


# Deposition by Study Phase Across Marsh Area

sed_phase_area_noG2= ggplot(plot_data_noG2, aes(x = Marsh_Area, y = Flux, color = Study.Phase)) +
  facet_wrap(~Site) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Marsh Area ", y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
  ) 

sed_phase_area_noG2

```

```{r, Statistical Table}


# general summary 

general_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = round(mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SD = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Median = round(median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min = round(min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max = round(max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SE = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()), 3)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    CI95_Lower = round(Mean - qt(0.975, n - 1) * SE, 3),
    CI95_Upper = round(Mean + qt(0.975, n - 1) * SE, 3)
  )

general_summary

# Phenological Summary

phen_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Phen_Period) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = round(mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SD = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Median = round(median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min = round(min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max = round(max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SE = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()), 3),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

phen_summary


# site summary 

site_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = round(mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SD = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Median = round(median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min = round(min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max = round(max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SE = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()), 3),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
site_summary

# study phase summary 

phase_summary <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Study.Phase) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = round(mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SD = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Median = round(median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min = round(min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max = round(max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SE = round(sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()), 3),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
phase_summary


```

```{r, cleaner tables for publishing stats}

# Summary Table general

flux_summary_table <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE = SD / sqrt(n),
    Median = median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    CI95_Lower = Mean - qt(0.975, n - 1) * SE,
    CI95_Upper = Mean + qt(0.975, n - 1) * SE
  ) %>%
  gt::gt() %>%
  gt::tab_header(
    title = "Summary Statistics for Sediment Flux",
    subtitle = "Overall flux values across all sites and study phases"
  ) %>%
  gt::cols_label(
    n = "n",
    Mean = "Mean",
    SD = "SD",
    SE = "SE",
    Median = "Median",
    Min = "Minimum",
    Max = "Maximum",
    CI95_Lower = "95% CI Lower",
    CI95_Upper = "95% CI Upper"
  ) %>%
  gt::fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, SD, SE, Median, Min, Max, CI95_Lower, CI95_Upper),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note = "Flux units: g/m³"
  )

flux_summary_table


#publishable summary table for Phenological Period

flux_period_table <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Phen_Period) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE = SD / sqrt(n),
    Median = median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Sediment Flux by Phenological Period"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Phen_Period = "Phenological Period",
    n = "n",
    Mean = "Mean",
    SD = "SD",
    SE = "SE",
    Median = "Median",
    Min = "Minimum",
    Max = "Maximum"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, SD, SE, Median, Min, Max),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note = "Flux units: g/m³"
  )

flux_period_table


# for marsh edge type

flux_edge_table <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(marsh_edge_type) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE = SD / sqrt(n),
    Median = median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Sediment Flux by Marsh Edge Type"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    marsh_edge_type = "Marsh Edge Type",
    n = "n",
    Mean = "Mean",
    SD = "SD",
    SE = "SE",
    Median = "Median",
    Min = "Minimum",
    Max = "Maximum"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, SD, SE, Median, Min, Max),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note = "Flux units: g/m³"
  )

flux_edge_table

# for site 

flux_site_table <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE = SD / sqrt(n),
    Median = median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Sediment Flux by Site"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Site = "Site",
    n = "n",
    Mean = "Mean",
    SD = "SD",
    SE = "SE",
    Median = "Median",
    Min = "Minimum",
    Max = "Maximum"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, SD, SE, Median, Min, Max),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = "Flux units: g/m³"
  )

flux_site_table

```

```{r, tests for normality}

flux_site_phen <- master_thesis %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    Site,
    Phen_Period
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    Mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE = SD / sqrt(n),
    Median = median(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Sediment Flux by Site"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Site = "Site",
    n = "n",
    Mean = "Mean",
    SD = "SD",
    SE = "SE",
    Median = "Median",
    Min = "Minimum",
    Max = "Maximum"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, SD, SE, Median, Min, Max),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = "Flux units: g/m³"
    )

flux_site_phen
```
